summary.key_theme: 市場對 Qualcomm 在 AI 晶片領域的競爭力存疑，且面臨關鍵客戶流失與股價下行壓力。

bearish.title: Goldman Sachs Cautious on QUALCOMM (QCOM) Amid Key Customer Losses
bearish.reason: 高盛對 Qualcomm 持謹慎態度，主要歸因於關鍵客戶流失，這直接威脅到公司的營收穩定性與市場份額。

bearish.title: Jim Cramer Says He Thinks “Arm’s Much Better Than Qualcomm”
bearish.reason: 知名財經評論員 Jim Cramer 公開表示看好 Arm 優於 Qualcomm，此類言論可能影響散戶投資信心。

bearish.title: Evaluating Qualcomm (QCOM) After A Sharp Share Price Decline And Strong FY2025 Start
bearish.reason: 儘管 FY2025 開局強勁，但近期股價出現急劇下跌，顯示市場對其成長持續性存在疑慮。

bearish.title: Qualcomm (QCOM) Stock Slides as Market Rises: Facts to Know Before You Trade
bearish.reason: 在整體市場上漲背景下，Qualcomm 股價逆勢下跌 1.42 %，反映出該個股近期相對疲軟的市場表現。

neutral.title: INTC vs. QCOM: Which Semiconductor Stock Is a Better Buy?
neutral.reason: 文章對比 Intel 與 Qualcomm 在 AI 晶片策略上的競爭，屬於中立的產業分析，未給出明確買入或賣出建議。

neutral.title: Is Most-Watched Stock QUALCOMM Incorporated (QCOM) Worth Betting on Now?
neutral.reason: 僅為針對 Zacks.com 用戶關注度的技術性分析，未包含實質性的利多或利空消息。
